---
title: "Resume"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Professional Experience

I am a Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management student at the
University of British Columbia with a background in Geography and
Environmental Management from the University of Waterloo. My experience
spans GIS, spatial analysis, environmental planning, data visualization,
and geospatial decision support. Across academic, co-op, and
professional projects, I have worked with ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, Python, R,
SQL, Tableau, and Power BI to support environmental analysis and
infrastructure planning.

## Education

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM)**\
University of British Columbia, Vancouver, Canada\
Expected April 2026

**Honours Bachelor of Environmental Studies (Co-op), Geography and
Environmental Management**\
University of Waterloo, Waterloo, Canada\
Fall 2019 – April 2025

## Technical Skills

-   **GIS and Mapping:** ArcGIS Pro, ArcMap, QGIS, digital mapping,
    geocoding, network analysis
-   **Programming and Data Analysis:** Python, R, SQL Server,
    PostgreSQL/PostGIS, SPSS
-   **Visualization:** Tableau, Power BI, Excel
-   **Remote Sensing:** RADAR, LiDAR, Google Earth Engine, drone
    operation
-   **Applied Areas:** environmental impact assessment, regional
    planning, spatial analysis, risk mapping, project support

## Selected Experience

### GIS & Geospatial Intelligence Analyst

**AECO Innovation Lab**\
Richmond Hill, Canada\
January 2024 – April 2024

-   Analyzed land use changes in Clarington area across past decade,
    identifying trends through spatial data analysis to inform future
    regional planning
-   Developed GIS-based transportation network model for Kawartha Lakes
    region to enhance traffic flow predictions, road construction
    planning and overall transportation efficiency
-   Optimized Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) for Niagara Falls
    area by conducting spatial analysis to identify potential
    environmental risks and proposing effective mitigation measures
-   Collected and processed geospatial data from multiple sources using
    ArcGIS including data cleaning, integration and analysis; produced
    infrastructure atlases for Grimsby and St. Catharines to support
    urban planning and infrastructure project implementation
-   Conducted geospatial analysis of land use, transportation networks
    and environmental impacts to provide actionable insights for
    regional development and infrastructure planning; visualized spatial
    data by creating maps, charts and other materials to facilitate
    informed decision-making
-   Prepared technical documents and project reports to outline analysis
    processes and results, ensuring transparency and sustainability in
    project execution


### Water & Wastewater Infrastructure Planner

**Region of Peel**\
Brampton, Canada\
September 2022 – December 2022

-   Created 4 types of maps using ArcMap, showcasing versatility in
    map-making and ability to enhance project analysis
-   Used ArcGIS to refine sewer and downspout data for City of Brampton
    by applying filters and tools to ensure data accuracy and relevance
-   Updated and managed smoke test data for Region of Peel using Excel,
    effectively maintaining up-to-date result records
-   Summarized construction report data and maps in MS Word for
    documentation review to drive clear and efficient project
    communication
-   Supported wastewater management efforts in Region of Peel by
    producing 40 maps for 10 sites in 4 months

### Data Analyst

**Accenture**\
Shanghai, China (Remote)\
May 2023 – August 2023

-   Designed and implemented automated data processing and report
    generation systems, reducing
-   Collected, cleaned and preprocessed data from multiple sources using
    Python and SQL to maintain accuracy and consistency for reliable
    analysis
-   Employed Excel and Tableau to perform data analysis and create
    visualizations to present results and support team decision-making

### Technical Documentation Engineer

**Oneflow Technology Limited**\
Beijing, China Jan 2022 - Apr 2022\

-   Acquired coding-related translation and testing skills including
    submitting API translation documents and assisting in refinement of
    2 databases
-   Managed translation tasks and supported publicity department with
    video clips and article translations
-   Aided social media growth initiative, successfully increasing
    company's followers by 2,000 in 2 months via effective content
    translation and engagement

### Research Assistant

**Fibos Inc.**\
Toronto, Canada\
July 2024 – August 2024

-   Researched combustion monitoring technologies and their
    environmental applications
-   Used Power BI to analyze and visualize system performance data
-   Contributed literature reviews, reporting, and
    sustainability-related analysis

## Certifications

-   Small Remotely Piloted Aircraft in Visual Line-Of-Sight (VLOS)
    Certificate -- Transport Canada (2022)
-   Integrate Data with the FME Platform -- FME Academy Certificate (2025) 
-   GIS: Geographic Information Systems for Sustainability -- University
    of Michigan (2025)
-   Healthcare Provider BLS/AED -- National Health & Safety
    Association (2025)
-   Renewable Energy Technology Fundamentals Certificate -- University
    of Colorado Boulder (2024)

## Download Resume

[Download my full resume](YakunZhou_resume_MGEM.pdf)
